default_profile_policy.reason: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra are active by explicit configuration policy; optional A/B evidence may measure behavior but does not gate activation or claim superiority.

capabilities.rationale: The exact xhigh option needs installed-runtime evidence before this profile can execute.
Max remains out of the comparison until installed-runtime evidence proves the option surface.
Pro mode remains out of the comparison because no installed OpenCode option key is proven.
Persisted reasoning remains out of scope because no safe installed host integration is proven.
The baseline preserves the starting temperature as evidence, not as a GPT-5.6 capability claim.

provenance.note: Exact role model and options preserved from the starting commit.

profiles.rationale: Immutable paired-evaluation baseline; retaining it prevents configuration parsing from being mistaken for GPT-5.6 acceptance.

runtime_capability_requirements.rationale: Hard architecture and review candidates need installed evidence that xhigh is effective, not ignored.
Max comparisons are excluded until the installed runtime proves an exact supported option.
Pro comparisons are excluded because no OpenCode configuration key has installed-runtime proof.
